vocab.api: Django REST Framework: ModelViewSet for CRUD. Serializers for validation + serialization. DefaultRouter for URL registration.
vocab.authentication: simplejwt: TokenObtainPairView + TokenRefreshView. IsAuthenticated permission class. Custom permissions extend BasePermission.
vocab.database: Django ORM. select_related() for FK joins, prefetch_related() for M2M to avoid N+1. F() expressions for atomic updates.
vocab.search: Q objects for complex queries. django-filter for DRF query param filtering. SearchVector + SearchQuery for full-text search.
vocab.async: async def views with Django 4.1+. sync_to_async/async_to_sync wrappers for ORM in async context.
